goals: Find previously saved trail preferences and favorite parks in Boone
Store information about a newly discovered trail
Review all saved trail memories to organize favorite locations
Remove outdated or incorrect trail information

user_agent_config.personality: Passionate about outdoor exploration, organized, and detail-oriented about trail conditions
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Knows local trails well but unfamiliar with memory management tools

end_condition: User has successfully searched, added, reviewed, and cleaned up their trail memories
